name: ai.aethex/aethexai-mcp
description: MCP server that enables interaction with Aethex voice agents, speech synthesis, transcription, and conversation APIs

environment_variables.description: Optional API base URL override. Defaults to https://api.aethexai.com if not provided.
environment_variables.name: AETHEX_BASE_URL

environment_variables.description: The output mode for the MCP server. Defaults to 'files' if not provided.
environment_variables.name: AETHEX_MCP_OUTPUT_MODE

environment_variables.description: The base path for the MCP server. Defaults to $HOME/Desktop if not provided.
environment_variables.name: AETHEX_MCP_BASE_PATH
